Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Nov-29-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
George Eshoo, Esq. for Plaintiff: Samir Halteh, also present, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Joe Zughbaba as follows:
Damages/Principal $101,989.80
Prejudgment Interest $8,499.15
Attorney's Fees $20,000.00
Costs $346.50, for a total of $130,835.45
Counsel to prepare Judgment.

Nov. 29, 2005
Judgment received in court and signed by Comm. Kaplan.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-29-2005 Continued To Nov-18-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
